bnh.label: Bookmarks and History
bnh.desc: Saved bookmarks, browsing history and automatic daily backup snapshots.

passwords.label: Passwords
passwords.desc: Encrypted login credentials, backup copy, and the key database.

cookies.label: Cookies
cookies.desc: All stored site cookies including WAL journal.

extensions.label: Extensions / Add-ons
extensions.desc: Installed .xpi files, per-extension storage data, and all manifests.

prefs.label: Preferences
prefs.desc: Main browser config, user overrides, and UI state store.

sessions.label: Session / Open Tabs
sessions.desc: Current session, recovery backups, and upgrade snapshots.

zen_sessions.label: Zen Sessions
zen_sessions.desc: Zen-specific named sessions and their rolling backup history.

zen_themes.label: Zen Themes
zen_themes.desc: Enabled Zen themes and the generated theme stylesheet.

zen_keyboard_shortcuts.label: Zen Keyboard Shortcuts
zen_keyboard_shortcuts.desc: Custom keyboard shortcut bindings specific to Zen.

chrome.label: userChrome / userContent / Sine mods
chrome.desc: Custom CSS, Sine mod scripts, JS engine, locales, and theme overrides.

search.label: Search Engines
search.desc: Custom and default search engine definitions.

certificates.label: Certificates
certificates.desc: Trusted certificate store and manual overrides.

containers.label: Containers
containers.desc: Multi-Account Containers identities and tab assignments.

storage.label: Web Storage / IndexedDB
storage.desc: Per-origin localStorage, IndexedDB, service-worker caches, and storage registry.

permissions.label: Site Permissions
permissions.desc: Per-site camera, microphone, notifications, and other grants.

formhistory.label: Form History / Autofill
formhistory.desc: Saved form-field autofill entries and autofill profiles.

favicons.label: Favicons
favicons.desc: Cached site icons used in bookmarks, history, and tabs.

content_prefs.label: Per-site Content Preferences
content_prefs.desc: Per-origin zoom levels, character encoding overrides, etc.

sync.label: Firefox Sync
sync.desc: Sync account credentials, engine state, change queues, and logs.

protections.label: Privacy Protections DB
protections.desc: Tracking protection and Enhanced Privacy statistics.

network_state.label: Network & Security State
network_state.desc: HSTS/HPKP pins, OCSP staples, and security preload overrides.

handlers.label: Protocol / File Handlers
handlers.desc: Custom protocol and MIME-type handler assignments.

notifications.label: Notification Store
notifications.desc: Pending and dismissed web push notification records.

datareporting.label: Telemetry / Data Reporting
datareporting.desc: Glean telemetry database and reporting state (safe to skip).
